core_pages.page_title: Personal Injury Lawyer Atlanta | Peter Bricks, P.C.
core_pages.h1: Atlanta Personal Injury Lawyer Fighting for the Compensation You Deserve
core_pages.meta_description: Injured in an accident near Atlanta? Attorney Peter Bricks offers a free consultation and 19 years of experience fighting insurance companies for fair settlements.
core_pages.content_notes: Lead with the firm's track record (settlement results, 19 years licensed, Avvo 5.0/22 reviews). Add No Win No Fee + free consultation messaging above the fold. Add Attorney/LegalService schema with AggregateRating once GBP rating is confirmed. Link out to all 6 service pages and the 9 location pages in the footer.

service_pages.page_title: Car Accident Lawyer Atlanta | Free Consultation | Peter Bricks, P.C.
service_pages.meta_description: Hurt in a car accident in Atlanta? Peter Bricks negotiates with insurance companies and fights for fair compensation. No fee unless we win. Call today.
service_pages.content_notes: Cover the claims process from accident to settlement, dealing with insurance adjusters, common injuries, and GA's 2-year statute of limitations. Include FAQPage schema (5-8 Q&As) and LegalService schema with serviceType 'Car Accident Representation'. Link to the $1,325,000 and $300,000 settlement results with required disclaimer.

service_pages.page_title: Truck Accident Lawyer Atlanta | Peter Bricks, P.C.
service_pages.meta_description: Truck accidents involve complex liability and large insurance policies. Atlanta attorney Peter Bricks investigates the crash and builds your claim. Free case review.
service_pages.content_notes: Explain why truck accident claims differ from car accident claims (commercial insurance policies, federal trucking regulations, multiple liable parties). FAQPage + LegalService schema with serviceType 'Truck Accident Representation'.

service_pages.page_title: Motorcycle Accident Lawyer Atlanta | Peter Bricks, P.C.
service_pages.meta_description: Motorcycle accident injuries are often severe and underrated by insurers. Attorney Peter Bricks fights for the compensation riders deserve. Free consultation.
service_pages.content_notes: Address common insurer bias against motorcyclists, severity of injuries, and the claims process. FAQPage + LegalService schema with serviceType 'Motorcycle Accident Representation'.

service_pages.page_title: Pedestrian Accident Lawyer Atlanta | Peter Bricks, P.C.
service_pages.meta_description: Struck by a vehicle or left injured after a hit-and-run in Atlanta? Peter Bricks helps pedestrians pursue compensation through insurance and uninsured-motorist claims.
service_pages.content_notes: Cover hit-and-run claims specifically (uninsured motorist coverage), since this is a confirmed practice area per research-data.json. FAQPage + LegalService schema with serviceType 'Pedestrian Accident Representation'.

service_pages.page_title: Slip and Fall Lawyer Atlanta | Premises Liability | Peter Bricks, P.C.
service_pages.meta_description: Injured on someone else's property in Atlanta? Peter Bricks handles slip and fall and premises liability claims with a free initial consultation and no upfront fees.
service_pages.content_notes: Cover premises liability basics (duty of care, proving negligence, common locations like stores and apartment complexes). FAQPage + LegalService schema with serviceType 'Premises Liability Representation'. Frame as a general-PI extension, do not overstate case volume in this area.

service_pages.page_title: Wrongful Death Lawyer Atlanta | Peter Bricks, P.C.
service_pages.meta_description: Lost a loved one due to someone else's negligence? Peter Bricks helps Atlanta families pursue wrongful death claims with compassion and a free consultation.
service_pages.content_notes: Tone must be compassionate, not transactional. Cover who can file (GA wrongful death statute), what damages are recoverable, and the process. FAQPage + LegalService schema with serviceType 'Wrongful Death Representation'.

seo_priorities: Build the 6 case-type service pages (car, truck, motorcycle, pedestrian, slip and fall, wrongful death) with FAQPage + LegalService schema, the single biggest content gap identified in the SEO audit.
Build the 9 location pages for the service-area cities, each with unique local content (court references, area-specific framing) per the SEO skill's anti-duplication rules.
Launch the /results page surfacing the firm's settlement track record on the homepage and in navigation, with the required 'results do not guarantee a similar outcome' disclaimer on every entry.
Introduce 'No Win, No Fee' and free-consultation messaging on the homepage, /financing, and every service page, paired with the fee-structure disclaimer.
Start a 2-posts-per-month personal-injury-focused blog stream to rebalance the currently bankruptcy-heavy blog and build topical authority for the case-type keywords.

content_themes: Georgia statute of limitations and legal deadlines
Case-type specific guidance (truck, motorcycle, slip and fall)

internal_linking_strategy: Homepage links to all 6 service pages, the /results page, and /financing in primary navigation, plus a footer sitemap covering all 9 location pages. Each service page links to its 1-2 most relevant settlement results on /results (with disclaimer) and to the location pages for the cities where that case type is most searched. Each location page links back to the 2-3 most relevant service pages and to /contact. Blog posts link into the service page matching their topic and into /personal-injury-lawyer-atlanta. /financing and /results are linked from every service and location page footer CTA. /bankruptcy stays linked from primary navigation but is not cross-linked into the personal-injury cluster, keeping the two practice areas topically separate.
